session:
version: 0.3.10
name: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-dba-policy
predecessor: null
secrets:
- name: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
- name: MARIADB_CA_CERT
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: MARIADB_CA_CERT
- name: setupClientCert
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: setupClientCert
  kind: x509
services:
- name: mysql-3306
  mrenclaves:
  - 0c4d6f21d6adb63f1ccd182c31cf9af90f4e5a18e9726e9b473c18e3142caaa9
  environment:
    SCONE_LOG: ERROR
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION_DESTINATION: TCP:localhost:3306
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION_DESTINATION_IP: '*'
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION_IDENTITY: |
      $$SCONE::setupClientCert:privatekey:pkcs8:pem$$
      $$SCONE::setupClientCert:crt:pem$$"
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION_SERVER_AUTH: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_UNSUPPORTED_PROTOCOLS: refuse
  command:
  - mysql
  - --host
  - 127.0.0.1
  - --port
  - '3306'
  - -uroot
  - -p$$SCONE::MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:hex$$
  pwd: /
  persistency: None
- name: mysql-3307
  mrenclaves:
  - 0ece90c34d39332425c3c4ff7a94d590fe43a1627020df6e64d528907800f6f8
  environment:
    SCONE_LOG: ERROR
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION_DESTINATION: TCP:localhost:3307
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION_DESTINATION_IP: '*'
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION_IDENTITY: |
      $$SCONE::setupClientCert:privatekey:pkcs8:pem$$
      $$SCONE::setupClientCert:crt:pem$$"
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICATION_SERVER_AUTH: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_UNSUPPORTED_PROTOCOLS: refuse
  command:
  - mysql
  - --host
  - 127.0.0.1
  - --port
  - '3307'
  - -uroot
  - -p$$SCONE::MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:hex$$
  pwd: /
  persistency: None
access_policy:
  read:
  - ANY
  update:
  - CREATOR
security:
  attestation:
    mode: hardware
    tolerate:
    - debug-mode
    - hyperthreading
    - outdated-tcb
    - insecure-configuration
    - software-hardening-needed
    ignore_advisories: '*'
creator:
  signer: |
    -----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
    MCowBQYDK2VwAyEAcKtAFLOMRitgqlXJgLRvctwmDlY+xowL6ed9nQDHbc8=
    -----END PUBLIC KEY-----
